title: ZAMBOS WITHOUT BORDERS X RADIO HOUSE EP. 1
summary: The beginning of a new musical adventure bringing Guatemalan flavor to the world with Zambos and Radio House.
content_intro: Zambos Without Borders was born as a project that fuses our passion for snacks with music. In collaboration with Radio House, we present the first episode.
quote: Every great journey begins with a first step, and this is ours towards a world without borders.
content_after_quote: With special guests and lots of energy, this first episode laid the foundation for what will be an unforgettable series.
